lines.english: Gazing upon the wonder of God's Creation, I am wonder-struck and amazed.
The Gurmukh obtains the Naam, the Name of the Lord, by His Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਪਰੁ ਹੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare soee par hog |
lines.english: Whatever He does, surely comes to pass.
He is the Great Giver; He has no greed at all.
The Creator Himself enjoys all delights.
O Nanak, living the Word of the Shabad, the mortal meets with God. ||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਚੇਤੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eko chetai fir jon na aavai |
lines.english: Remembering the One Lord, one does not have to enter the cycle of reincarnation.
By perfect destiny, one acts in truth.
Basant, Third Mehl:
who remains intuitively absorbed in the True Name. ||1||
The Gurmukh acts, lovingly attuned to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam is jag meh aaeaa |
lines.english: Fruitful is the coming into the world, and the life of one

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਗ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad jag maeh samaanee |
lines.english: through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is spread throughout the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan kee hai saachee baanee |
lines.english: True is the speech of that humble being;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har naam sevahu vichahu aap gavaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Be dedicated to the Lord's Name, and eradicate self-conceit from within. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik saachai sabad rahe liv laae |
lines.english: Some remain lovingly attuned to the True Word of the Shabad.
Imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Lord's humble servant is recognized and renowned. ||2||
Throughout the four ages, his fame and glory spread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਪਗ ਪੰਕਜ ਧੂਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee pag pankaj dhoor |3|
lines.english: They are the dust of the lotus feet of the humble Saints. ||3||
They meditate on the True Lord, and behold Him near at hand, ever-present.
True are those humble beings who love the True Lord.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, comes Union with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin sach seviaa tin ras paaeaa |
lines.english: Whoever serves the True Lord finds joy.
There is only One Creator Lord; there is no other at all.
O Nanak, he is intuitively absorbed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||7||
Basant, Third Mehl:
The Lord's humble servant worships Him, and beholds Him ever-present, near at hand.
are blessed with understanding by the Perfect True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਪਗ ਪੰਕਜ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee pag pankaj dhoor |
lines.english: He is the dust of the lotus feet of the humble Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਸਦ ਰਹਹਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har setee sad raheh liv laae |
lines.english: Those who remain lovingly attuned to the Lord forever
So serve the One Lord, and no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: daasaa kaa daas viralaa koee hoe |
lines.english: How rare are those who become the slave of the Lord's slaves.
They attain the supreme status. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਕਿਉ ਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis bin avar sevee kiau maae |2|
lines.english: Why should I serve any other than Him, O my mother? ||2||
Serving Him, eternal peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu marai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: He does not die; He does not come and go in reincarnation.
The Gurmukhs gather in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਚੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: se jan saache jinee saach pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: True are those humble beings who realize the True Lord.
Conquering their self-conceit, they merge intuitively into the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਤੂ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin giaan keea tis har too jaan |
lines.english: Know the Lord, who gave you spiritual wisdom,
Their minds are immaculate, and their reputations are immaculate. ||3||
O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam - their reputations are true. ||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੈ ਤਾਂ ਸੁਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har ras chaakhai taan sudh hoe |
lines.english: When the mortal tastes the sublime essence of the Lord, he becomes pure and holy.
and realize the One God, through the True Word of the Shabad.
Why have the wandering self-willed manmukhs even come into the world?
True is their speech; they love the Naam.
Basant, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਕੁਲਾਂ ਕਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam rate kulaan kaa kareh udhaar |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord - their generations are redeemed and saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad saach ur dhaarai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he enshrines the True Lord within his heart. ||1||Pause||
Forgetting the Naam, the mortals waste their lives away. ||1||
One who dies while yet alive, truly dies, and embellishes his death.
Truth is the food of the Gurmukh; his body is sanctified and pure.
His mind is immaculate; he is forever the ocean of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਨੀਸਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har dar neesaanai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he goes to the Lord's Court with his banners flying proudly.
He is not forced to come and go in the cycle of birth and death.
By Guru's Grace, he merges in the True Lord. ||2||
Serving the True Lord, one realizes Truth.
